title: GodMode Support Tailscale ACL
description: Tailscale ACL policy for GodMode remote support. Apply in Tailscale admin console.

acls.comment: Allow support to SSH to customer machines
Allow customers to reach support infrastructure if needed

ssh.comment: Require per-session approval for SSH. Customer gets push notification.

nodeAttrs.comment: Disable funnel on customer machines for security

security-notes: action:check requires customer to approve each SSH session via Tailscale app
No SSH keys are stored - authentication is identity-based
All sessions are logged in Tailscale admin console
setup-steps: 1. Apply this ACL in Tailscale admin console
2. Tag the support host machine as godmode-support
3. Tag each customer machine as godmode-customer
4. Enable Tailscale SSH on customer machines: tailscale set --ssh
5. Customer must have Tailscale app installed to receive approval requests
